mission.title: opentofu: Concise mode for tofu plan
mission.description: Concise mode for tofu plan. Requested by 20+ users.

steps.title: Check OpenTofu installation
steps.description:
Verify your OpenTofu version:
```bash
tofu version
```
This feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/.

steps.title: Understand the feature context
steps.description:
It would be great to have a way to shrink the output of terraform, which is very noisy. 
A `--short` or `--concise` parameter where only the resources updated would show, and all the refresh and noisy info on apply or plan would be filtered out.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Concise mode for tofu plan
Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the feature is working as expected:
```bash
tofu version
tofu validate
tofu plan
```
Confirm that the feature described in "Concise mode for tofu plan" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
### Implemented -concise flag that reduces the noise in the output of plan

Instead of adding another ViewType like HumanView or JsonView, I chose to add a bool flag for concise within the global View that takes care of compact warnings and no colour so that in future if a concise mode needs to be implemented for other commands like apply or destroy, the same flag can be used.

prerequisites.description: OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration.
